name: New customer, AC not cooling, wants quote
description: Homeowner calls because AC stopped cooling. Gives name, address, phone. Asks for a quote.

name: Furnace dead in winter, family inside
description: Caller's furnace died overnight. It's mid-winter. Family including children at home with no heat.

name: Elderly caller, heat not working, elderly home
description: Elderly person calls - they're 78 years old, heat has been out since yesterday, temperature dropping outside.

name: Caller has infant, AC out in summer heat
description: Parent calls - has a 3-month-old baby at home, AC stopped working, it's 95 degrees outside.

name: Commercial building, wants maintenance contract
description: Property manager for a 12-unit apartment complex calls wanting a recurring maintenance contract for the HVAC systems.

name: Caller mentions competitor couldn't fix it
description: Caller says ARS came out last week and couldn't fix their AC problem. Wants a second opinion and a quote.

name: New homeowner, wants full HVAC inspection
description: Just bought a house, wants a full HVAC system inspection before moving in. Asks what it would cost.

name: Caller unsure but gave address and phone
description: Caller says 'I'm not sure if I want service yet' but gives their full name, address, and phone number when asked.

name: Carbon monoxide detector went off near furnace
description: Caller is panicked - CO detector went off near furnace. They opened windows and stepped outside. Wants someone out immediately.

name: Rental property owner, tenant unit needs fix ASAP
description: Landlord calls - tenant has been complaining about AC for 2 days, it's July, needs it fixed urgently to avoid lease issues.

name: AC making loud banging noise, wants it looked at
description: Caller hears a loud banging or clanging noise from their AC unit when it runs. System still kind of works. Wants it diagnosed.

name: Caller explicitly says it is an emergency
description: Caller says the words 'this is an emergency' - furnace stopped working, it's cold, they need someone today.

name: Caller gave only name and problem, no address yet
description: Caller gives name and says AC is broken but doesn't have their address memorized. Leaves phone number.

name: Existing customer reporting new issue
description: Caller says 'you fixed my AC last year, now my furnace has a problem' - clearly a real customer with a new service need.

name: Spanish-speaking caller, clear HVAC repair request
description: Caller speaks Spanish. Clearly communicates that their air conditioning is broken and they need a technician. Gives contact info.

name: Telemarketer trying to sell the company something
description: Caller is a salesperson trying to sell SEO services or Google Ads management to the HVAC company. No service need.

name: Robocall, dead air, no real caller
description: Robocall - automated voice or silence. Sophie says hello a few times, no real person responds.

name: Wrong number, caller hung up after hello
description: Caller realizes immediately they dialed the wrong number and hangs up after a brief exchange.

name: Caller asking for directions to office
description: Caller is asking where the physical office is located - wants to come in person. No repair or service request.

name: Existing client asking about their invoice
description: Existing customer calls to ask about a charge on their invoice. Billing question only, no new service needed.

name: Prank call or incoherent caller
description: Caller is clearly prank calling - laughing, saying nonsense, not requesting any real service.

name: Caller explicitly says do not call me back
description: Caller says 'I'm just curious, not ready yet, please don't call me back or send anyone out'.

name: Spam caller BUT mentions smoke smell near furnace
description: Caller initially seems like a robocall or spam but suddenly mentions they smell smoke near their furnace - safety emergency.

name: Very short call, name plus phone plus AC broken then hung up
description: Very brief call - caller gives name, phone, says 'my AC is broken' and hangs up before Sophie can ask more.

name: Caller mentions competitor explicitly
description: Caller says 'ARS couldn't fix it, can you help?' - warm lead with frustration at a competitor.
